div.head: Earl Granville to General Schenck
div.p: Sir: I have the honor to acknowledge the receipt of your note of the 10th instant, informing me of the appointment of Judge James S. Frazer as a commissioner under Article XII of the treaty of Washington, and I beg leave to thank you for this communication.
I have at the same time the honor to inform you that Mr. Russell Gurney, recorder of London, has been appointed Her Majesty’s commissioner under the same article of the treaty.
